# airtelcloud_lb_vip (Resource)

Manages a VIP (Virtual IP) port for an Airtel Cloud Load Balancer Service.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `lb_service_id` (String) The ID of the parent LB service.

### Read-Only

- `fixed_ips` (String) The fixed IP addresses assigned to the VIP.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the VIP.
- `name` (String) The name of the VIP.
- `provider_port_id` (String) The provider port ID.
- `public_ip` (String) The public IP address of the VIP.
- `status` (String) The current status of the VIP.
